overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, holographic advertisements, and futuristic architecture. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), showing the player character descending stairs, crossing plazas, and walking along wet streets under overpasses with dense digital billboards.

events.description: begins descending wet concrete stairs toward highway level

agents.ego_description: walking down rain-slicked stairs alongside a highway overpass, observing traffic below

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving along the wet highway below the overpass

entered.detail: elevated highway structure with vehicles traveling on it
black metal safety railing along the stairs
rain-slicked concrete stairs descending to street level
tall modern street lamps illuminating the highway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night atop an elevated walkway beside a highway overpass. The camera descends wet concrete stairs, passing black metal railings, while futuristic vehicles drive along the illuminated highway below. The environment is urban and exposed to the heavy rain, with artificial lighting from street lamps reflecting off wet surfaces.

events.description: reaches bottom of stairs and enters open plaza with large green holographic cube
looks upward at towering skyscrapers with bright neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza while looking around at the towering neon-lit buildings and holographic displays

notable_agents.action: person standing near the stairs in the plaza

entered.detail: large rotating green holographic advertisement cube projecting light
wet tiled ground reflecting neon lights
bright pink and blue neon signage on building facades
massive dark tower with illuminated windows rising into the night

segments.scene_description: Having descended the stairs, the scene opens into a wide plaza dominated by a massive green holographic cube rotating above the wet pavement. The camera pans upward to reveal towering skyscrapers covered in neon signage, while a lone pedestrian stands near the stairs. The atmosphere is distinctly cyberpunk with heavy rain and vibrant neon reflections.

events.description: ascends stairs from plaza to street level intersection
futuristic vehicles pass through the intersection while waiting at crosswalk

agents.ego_description: ascending stairs to street level and walking along the sidewalk near a crosswalk, observing traffic

notable_agents.action: blue futuristic sports car driving through the wet intersection

entered.detail: illuminated walk sign showing yellow pedestrian symbol
yellow striped pedestrian crossing markings on wet asphalt
concrete pedestrian walkway alongside the street
tall pole with traffic signals and yellow warning stripes

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends stairs from the plaza to a street-level intersection, where a pedestrian crossing signal shows the walk sign. Futuristic vehicles drive through the wet crosswalk as the camera walks along the sidewalk. The scene transitions from the open plaza to a more enclosed street environment with traffic infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: street under highway overpass with dense billboards

events.description: enters covered area beneath highway overpass with dense digital advertisements
camera tilts upward to view towering structure with large billboard

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the street under the overpass, observing the digital billboards and passing vehicles

entered.detail: concrete highway overpass creating a covered corridor
large illuminated advertisement screens showing various commercials
bright orange safety barrier along the right side of the walkway
tall palm trees visible in the distance along the street

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath a massive highway overpass, the street becomes a corridor of bright digital billboards and neon advertisements. The orange safety railing guides the path along the wet asphalt, while the overpass provides partial shelter from the rain. The environment feels dense and urban, with the overpass structure dominating the sky view.

scene_state.functional_zone: financial district under overpass approaching bank

events.description: large 'WET DREAM' billboard and Marmur Bank signage become prominent
camera tilts up to view the full height of the circular tower with rotating rings

agents.ego_description: walking forward while looking up at the towering structures and billboards, approaching the bank building

notable_agents.action: black futuristic sedan driving ahead under the overpass

entered.detail: large purple billboard with 'WET DREAM' text and imagery
massive cylindrical skyscraper with illuminated rings and spire
building facade with large 'MARMUR BANK' neon signage

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the Marmur Bank building under the overpass, dominated by a massive 'WET DREAM' billboard and a towering circular skyscraper with illuminated rings. The camera frequently tilts upward to admire the scale of the architecture and advertisements. The street continues under the overpass with wet asphalt reflecting the neon lights, maintaining the dense cyberpunk atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an exposed elevated walkway down into the dense, neon-saturated corridors of a rainy cyberpunk city. It begins by descending wet concrete stairs beside a highway overpass, where artificial street lamps reflect off the rain-slicked surfaces. As the camera reaches the bottom, the environment opens into a wide plaza dominated by a rotating green holographic cube and towering skyscrapers draped in neon signage. The scene then shifts as the camera ascends to a street-level intersection, moving past pedestrian signals and futuristic traffic before entering the sheltered enclosure of a massive highway overpass. Finally, the path follows an orange safety railing through a corridor of bright digital billboards, culminating in a view of the Marmur Bank building and a circular skyscraper with illuminated rings.
